workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what minimum scaffold files are required at creation time.
workflow_runs.decision: After explicit new-workflow confirmation, create draft scaffold files immediately: skills/<workflow-slug>/SKILL.md, data/<workflow-slug>/, docs/status/YYYY-MM-DD-<workflow-slug>-status.md, and the workflow-run context manifest. Mark scaffold surfaces as draft and fill them progressively.
